mapper.sql: id, app_code, job_name, handler_name, schedule_type, schedule_conf, route_strategy, block_strategy, retry_count, timeout_seconds, status, alarm_inherit_app, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO job_info ( app_code, job_name, handler_name, schedule_type, schedule_conf, route_strategy, block_strategy, retry_count, timeout_seconds, status, alarm_inherit_app, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) VALUES ( #{appCode}, #{jobName}, #{handlerName}, #{scheduleType}, #{scheduleConf}, #{routeStrategy}, #{blockStrategy}, #{retryCount}, #{timeoutSeconds}, #{status}, #{alarmInheritApp}, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE job_info SET app_code = #{appCode}, job_name = #{jobName}, handler_name = #{handlerName}, schedule_type = #{scheduleType}, schedule_conf = #{scheduleConf}, route_strategy = #{routeStrategy}, block_strategy = #{blockStrategy}, retry_count = #{retryCount}, timeout_seconds = #{timeoutSeconds}, status = #{status}, alarm_inherit_app = #{alarmInheritApp}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE job_info SET status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{id}
